---
title: "1.Data_Pre-Processing"
author: "sss322"
date: "2025-30-08"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

# **0. Libraries & project setup**
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
pkgs <- c(
  "dplyr","tidyr","tibble","stringr","readr","readxl",
  "ggplot2","openxlsx","rrBLUP",
  "RSpectra", 
  "ASRgenomics",     
  "asreml"          
  # "ASRtriala"      
)
suppressPackageStartupMessages(invisible(lapply(pkgs, require, character.only = TRUE)))

r <- function(...) file.path(getwd(), ...)
r()
```


# **1.Pedigree: load & family mapping**
```{r}
#load(r("data/geno/wmb_pedigree.Rdata"))
wmb_ped<- read_xlsx("wmb_ped.xlsx")

wmb_ped <- wmb_ped %>%
  mutate(
    fam = if_else(Population == "Parents", "Parent", paste(Par1, Par2, sep = " × ")),
    fam = if_else(fam == "0 × 0", "Parent", fam),
    Par2 = if_else(Par2 == "0", "Parent", Par2)
  )

# Map for joins later
fam_map <- wmb_ped %>%
  dplyr::select(GID = Ind, Fam = fam)
table(fam_map$Fam)
```




# **2.Genotype: raw markers + SNP positions (Morex V3)**

```{r}
# Raw HapMap
wmb_gt <- read_delim(
  r("data/geno/WMBgenoDH_RIL.hmp.txt"),
  delim = "\t", escape_double = FALSE, trim_ws = TRUE,
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)

#wmb_gt <- read_delim(
 # r("data/geno/all_filter.hmp.txt"),
  #delim = "\t", escape_double = FALSE, trim_ws = TRUE,
  #col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))


# SNP positions (Morex V3): 
pos_V3 <- read_excel(r("data/geno/SNPPositions_50k_on_MorexV3.xlsx")) %>%
  rename(`rs#` = 1, chrom = 2, pos = 3) %>%
  mutate(
    chrom = chrom %>%
      str_replace_all("chr|CHR|H|_random|r", "") %>%
      substr(1, 1),
    chrom = case_when(
      chrom %in% as.character(1:7) ~ chrom,
      TRUE ~ "0"  # unknown / unplaced
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(chrom, pos)

# Join positions to genotype table
wmb_gt <- wmb_gt %>%
  dplyr::select(-any_of(c("chrom","pos"))) %>%
  left_join(pos_V3, by = "rs#") %>%
  mutate(chrom = replace_na(chrom, "0")) %>%
  relocate(chrom, pos, .after = `rs#`) %>%
  arrange(chrom, pos)


mat<- t(as.matrix(wmb_gt[,12:677]))
#mat<- t(as.matrix(wmb_gt[,12:666]))
colnames(mat)<- wmb_gt$`rs#`


###############################################################################################
# Convert a genotype matrix/data frame (cols = markers, rows = samples) to 0/1/2
code012_from_iupac <- function(G, minor_is_2 = TRUE) {
  G <- as.data.frame(G, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  # normalize calls to single-letter IUPAC (A,C,G,T,R,Y,S,W,K,M,N)
  norm_one <- function(x) {
    x <- toupper(trimws(as.character(x)))
    x[x %in% c("-", ".", "", "NA")] <- "N"
    x <- gsub("/", "", x); x <- gsub("\\|", "", x)
    # map two-letter diplotypes to IUPAC
    map2 <- c(AA="A", CC="C", GG="G", TT="T",
              AG="R", GA="R", CT="Y", TC="Y",
              CG="S", GC="S", AT="W", TA="W",
              GT="K", TG="K", AC="M", CA="M")
    two <- nchar(x) == 2
    x[two] <- map2[x[two]]
    # if already "AA","BB" style with same letter, collapse
    x[nchar(x) == 1 & !(x %in% c("A","C","G","T","R","Y","S","W","K","M","N"))] <- NA
    x  }
  IUPAC <- list(
    A = "A", C = "C", G = "G", T = "T",
    R = c("A","G"), Y = c("C","T"), S = c("G","C"),
    W = c("A","T"), K = c("G","T"), M = c("A","C")  )

  out <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = nrow(G), ncol = ncol(G),
                dimnames = list(rownames(G), colnames(G)))

  for (j in seq_len(ncol(G))) {
    col <- norm_one(G[[j]])
    # infer the two alleles from data (weighted by hets)
    alleles_obs <- unlist(IUPAC[col[!is.na(col) & col != "N"]])
    alleles_obs <- alleles_obs[alleles_obs %in% c("A","C","G","T")]
    if (length(alleles_obs) == 0L) next
    af <- sort(table(alleles_obs), decreasing = TRUE)

    if (length(af) == 1L) {
      major <- names(af)[1]; minor <- setdiff(c("A","C","G","T"), major)[1]
    } else {
      major <- names(af)[1]; minor <- names(af)[2]    }

    out[, j] <- vapply(col, function(z) {
      if (is.na(z) || z == "N") return(NA_real_)
      if (z %in% c("A","C","G","T")) {
        if (z == major) return(0)
        if (z == minor) return(if (minor_is_2) 2 else 2)
        return(NA_real_) # third allele present -> set NA
      } else {        # heterozygote codes
        pair <- IUPAC[[z]]
        if (all(c(major, minor) %in% pair)) return(1)
        return(NA_real_)   }
    }, numeric(1))  }
  as.data.frame(out, check.names = FALSE)}
###############################################################################################
geno012 <- code012_from_iupac(mat, minor_is_2 = TRUE)
mat<- as.matrix(geno012)

A1<- ASRgenomics::G.matrix(mat, method = "VanRaden", na.string = "NA")
A1<- A1$G
save( A1, file= "data/geno/WMB_master_geno.Rdata")
###############################################################################################
D1 <- ASRgenomics::G.matrix(
  mat,
  method = "Vitezica",
  na.string = "NA"
)

A1 <- D1$G
save(A1, file= "data/geno/WMB_master_geno_D.Rdata")
```


# **3. Relationship matrix (A) & PCA**
```{r}
# Load precomputed additive relationship matrix A1
#load(r("data/geno/WMB_master_geno_OLD.Rdata"))
load(r("data/geno/WMB_master_geno.Rdata"))
WinterRelationship <- A1
rm(A1)

# PCA using RSpectra (fast for large symmetric matrices)
k <- min(10, nrow(WinterRelationship) - 1)
WinterPCA <- eigs_sym(WinterRelationship, k = k)
WinterPVEPCA <- WinterPCA$values / sum(WinterPCA$values)

# Scores table
WinterPCA_scores <- as.data.frame(WinterPCA$vectors)
colnames(WinterPCA_scores) <- paste0("PC", seq_len(ncol(WinterPCA_scores)))
WinterPCA_scores$GID <- rownames(WinterRelationship)

# Merge with pedigree/family
WinterPCA_annot <- WinterPCA_scores %>%
  left_join(fam_map %>% rename(fam = Fam), by = "GID") #%>%
 # tidyr::drop_na(fam)

# Quick look
head(WinterPCA_annot[, c("GID","PC1","PC2","fam")])
```


# **4. PCA scatter (PC1 vs PC2)**
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(WinterPCA_annot, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(WinterPCA_annot, fam == "Parent"),
    color = "black", size = 3.5, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(WinterPCA_annot, fam != "Parent"),
    aes(color = fam), size = 3.5, alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set3") +
  labs(
    x = sprintf("PC1 (%.1f%%)", 100 * WinterPVEPCA[1]),
    y = sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%%)", 100 * WinterPVEPCA[2]),
    color = "Family"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text =  element_text(size= 16), legend.position = "bottom", legend.text = element_text(size= 8))


table(WinterPCA_annot$fam)
table(fam_map$Fam)



#A1<- D1$G
ASRgenomics::kinship.heatmap(A1)
```


# **5. Malting quality (MQ): import**
```{r}
MQ1 <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(r("data/pheno/MQ/WMBmstrMQ.xlsx")) %>%
  filter(Test == "WFullLab", Location != "Snyder") %>%
  mutate(
    plot_id = paste0(Year, PLOTID)
  )
colnames(MQ1)

MQ1<- MQ1[,c(1,33, 32, 5:18, 20)]
```

 
# **6. Spectral & agronomic: load multi-table and merge**
```{r}
load("C:/Users/Siim Sepp/NY_WMB/data/wmb_multi_alldata.Rdata")

data_all <- multi %>%
  left_join(MQ1[,c(-1,-3)], by = c("plot_id"))

unique(data_all$KernelWeight.mg.)

# Optional: add family labels to data_all
data_all <- data_all %>% left_join(fam_map, by = "GID")

# Persist merged data for downstream analyses
save(data_all, file = r("data/WMB_pheno.Rdata"))
```


# **7. Subset into working dataframes**

**Agronomic data**
```{r}
# Keep only Timepoint 1 rows with positive yield
data_ag <- data_all %>%
  filter(Timepoint == "1", .data$yield_kgha > 0)


data_ag <- data_ag %>%
  dplyr::select(
    plot_id, GID, Env, Timepoint,Row, Column,
    yield_kgha, HD_JD, winter_survival, 
    Fam  )

save(data_ag, file = r("data/data_ag.Rdata"))


#MQ

colnames(data_ag)
data_mq <- MQ1 %>% left_join(data_ag[,c(1,5,6,10)], by= c("plot_id"))
data_mq <- data_mq[,c(-6, -8, -9)]
colnames(data_mq)
data_mq<- data_mq %>% filter(Env %in% c("MCG23", "HELF24", "MCG25"))
table(data_mq$Env)
save(data_mq, file = r("data/data_mq.Rdata"))
```



**Spectral data**
```{r}
# Identify VI columns robustly by name pattern (edit if you prefer a fixed list)
VI_cols <- names(multi)[grepl("NDVI|NDRE|EVI|GNDVI|NRI|SAVI|ENDVI|GIPVI|PSRI", names(multi), ignore.case = FALSE)]

# Exclude problematic Env–Timepoint combos
drops <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  tibble::tribble(~Env, ~Timepoint, "SNY22","7", "HELF24","1"),
  tibble::tibble(Env = "MCG25", Timepoint = as.character(1:5))
)


drops$Timepoint <- as.numeric(drops$Timepoint)
multi$Timepoint <- as.numeric(multi$Timepoint)

multi_f <- multi %>%
  filter(DAS >90) %>%
  #anti_join(drops, by = c("Env","Timepoint")) %>%
  arrange(Env, Timepoint)

# Build per-Env wide matrices for *each* VI AND a "combined" matrix per Env.
envs <- unique(multi_f$Env)


# Helper to wide-pivot one VI in one Env
wide_one_vi <- function(df_env, vi_name) {
  df_env %>%
    dplyr::select(plot_id, Timepoint, all_of(vi_name)) %>%
    distinct(plot_id, Timepoint, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Timepoint, values_from = all_of(vi_name))
}

# Helper to wide-pivot all VI columns together (“combined”)
wide_combined <- function(df_env) {
  df_env %>%
    dplyr::select(plot_id, Timepoint, all_of(VI_cols)) %>%
    distinct(plot_id, Timepoint, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Timepoint, values_from = all_of(VI_cols))
}

# Construct VImats as: list[Env][[vi]] and [[combined]]
VImats <- setNames(vector("list", length(envs)), envs)

for (e in envs) {
  df_e <- multi_f %>% filter(Env == e)
  # per-VI
  per_vi <- setNames(vector("list", length(VI_cols)), VI_cols)
  for (vi in VI_cols) per_vi[[vi]] <- wide_one_vi(df_e, vi)
  # combined
  per_vi[["combined"]] <- wide_combined(df_e)
  VImats[[e]] <- per_vi
}

# Also keep a long-ish spectral dataframe with family labels (if needed)
data_sp <- multi_f %>%
  dplyr::select(plot_id, GID, Env, Timepoint, all_of(VI_cols)) %>%
  left_join(fam_map, by = "GID")

# Save outputs
save(VImats, file = r("data/VImat.Rdata"))
save(data_sp, file = r("data/data_sp.Rdata"))

# Quick check
table(data_sp$Env, data_sp$Timepoint)
```

  
  
#VImat with the GDD nr from Jan1 of the year.   
```{r}
load("data/JDmap.Rdata")

setdiff(names(multi_f), names(JD_map))
setdiff(names(JD_map), names(multi_f))

colnames(JD_map)
multi_f$Environment <- multi_f$Env
multi_f1<- left_join(multi_f, JD_map[,c(2,6,10)], by= c("Environment", "Timepoint"))

####################################################
multi_f1$Timepoint<- multi_f1$GDD

# Construct VImats as: list[Env][[vi]] and [[combined]]
VImats <- setNames(vector("list", length(envs)), envs)

for (e in envs) {
  df_e <- multi_f1 %>% filter(Env == e)
  # per-VI
  per_vi <- setNames(vector("list", length(VI_cols)), VI_cols)
  for (vi in VI_cols) per_vi[[vi]] <- wide_one_vi(df_e, vi)
  # combined
  per_vi[["combined"]] <- wide_combined(df_e)
  VImats[[e]] <- per_vi
}

# Also keep a long-ish spectral dataframe with family labels (if needed)
data_sp <- multi_f1 %>%
  dplyr::select(plot_id, GID, Env, Timepoint, all_of(VI_cols)) %>%
  left_join(fam_map, by = "GID")

# Save outputs
save(VImats, file = r("data/VImatG.Rdata"))
save(data_sp, file = r("data/data_spG.Rdata"))

# Quick check
table(data_sp$Env, data_sp$Timepoint)
```
